Be Kind Rewind (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,175,164Details
International Box Office $19,719,083
Worldwide Box Office $30,894,247
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,586,018
Total $5,586,018
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,050,655 (36.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:808 opening theaters/810 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,614,903

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 22nd, 2008 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: June 17th, 2008 by Turner Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual references
Running Time: 98 minutes
Plot point: Amateur Filmmakers, Money Troubles
Social setting: Movie Business
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Partizan Films
Production Countries: United Kingdom, France, United States
Languages: English
